      Job description

      WE ARE CCE.

      CCE is an international energy transition company with offices in seven countries. CCE develops and delivers clean energy solutions based on photovoltaic systems along the entire value chain - from project development and financing, construction, operation and maintenance to energy management.

      Our mission is to make our contribution to a consistent, global energy transition.


      WHAT WE OFFER

      We are an uncomplicated, appreciative and collegial team in an innovative and rapidly growing company in the crisis-proof energy industry.

      Under the motto "realising the future", over 200 employees from 25 nations are working on CCE's vision of a future with 100% renewable energy for a planet worth living on.

      Our excellent working atmosphere is characterised by our family-like corporate culture, a flat hierarchy and numerous employee events.

      We offer flexible working hours and home office.


      If the energy transition is also a matter of the heart for you, we look forward to receiving your meaningful application documents!
